stories.title: Auto-refresh dashboard with polling
stories.description: Add streamlit-autorefresh to poll for new data every 60 seconds.
acceptanceCriteria: streamlit-autorefresh installed
st_autorefresh(interval=60000) call exists in app.py
Dashboard auto-reruns without manual browser refresh

stories.title: Last-update timestamp and new-data badge
stories.description: Show mtime of most recent output JSON as timestamp with NEW badge when < 5 min old.
acceptanceCriteria: get_last_update_time() exists in data_loader.py
Header displays Last Updated timestamp
Green NEW badge appears when data < 5 min old
Tests for get_last_update_time() pass

stories.title: New video highlights — recent 24h cards
stories.description: Show videos analyzed within last 24 hours as highlighted cards at top of Overview.
acceptanceCriteria: get_recent_videos(hours=24) exists in data_loader.py
Overview tab shows New Analysis section with card layout
ACTIONABLE videos have green border, NOISE muted
Tests for get_recent_videos() pass

stories.title: Real-time status tab
stories.description: Status tab with scheduler info, pipeline activity log, next run estimate.
acceptanceCriteria: Status tab appears in tab_labels
Shows pipeline activity from output file timestamps
Shows last run age and channel count
get_pipeline_activity() tests pass

stories.title: Mobile UX + full UI redesign
stories.description: Dark finance theme, card-based layout, large KPIs, signal badges, scroll indicators.
acceptanceCriteria: Signal badges rendered as colored pills
Cards have proper spacing and borders
Tab bar has scroll fade indicators on mobile
Metric cards 2rem+ values with dark card backgrounds
No horizontal overflow on 375px viewport

stories.title: Channel signal alerts — ACTIONABLE highlight
stories.description: Prominent ACTIONABLE signal alerts with ticker chips on Overview and dedicated Signals tab.
acceptanceCriteria: extract_actionable_signals() exists in data_loader.py
Overview shows alert banner with ticker chips
Dedicated Signals tab with scored cards
Channel tabs show ACTIONABLE count badge
Tests for extract_actionable_signals() pass
